creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
Joe Marcus, good day.

Could you, please, glance over this PR -- change is just one line and it
is quite trivial, but the problem is a bit annoying for people who run
'port test' over certain ports ;))

Thanks in advance!
-- 
Eygene
